description: owine/* baseline — supply-chain hardened defaults. Pin everything, soak releases, escalate CVEs.

packageRules.description: Major bumps — separate PR per package, 7-day soak, manual review required
Pin Docker image and GitHub Action digests so a re-tagged image/action can't slip in
docker-compose: bump tags but never pin digests — keeps compose files readable for humans editing them by hand

Node version pins use LTS-aware versioning — Renovate's 'node' versioning scheme tracks LTS lines (22, 24, 26, ...) and skips Current/odd-numbered releases (23, 25, 27, ...). LTS-to-LTS major bumps still come as separate manual-review PRs via the major-bump rule above.

customManagers.description: Bump version literals in GitHub Actions workflow files when annotated with a `# renovate: datasource=X depName=Y` hint. Supports both trailing-comment style (hint on same line, after value) and leading-comment style (hint on the line immediately above the value). Patterns use horizontal-whitespace classes ([ \t]) instead of \s so they can't cross-attribute a value to a hint belonging to a different block. Reaches places the github-actions manager can't natively — strategy.matrix arrays, run-step args, env defaults — without requiring per-repo regex config.
